pages.text: $(italic)Novus's$() full guide to $(italic)Create$() and its many add-ons — rotation and stress, the core machines, trains, contraptions, and the systems each add-on layers on top. Where this Companion only points the way, that book explains the whole works.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + an $(italic)Andesite Alloy$(), shapeless.
pages.title: Create Compendium
